name: Salmon Party Spread
recipeIngredient: 7 1/2 oz pink salmon, drained and flaked with cartilage removed
2 tbsp sweet red pepper -- finely chopped
Pecans or additional parsley, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the first nine ingredients; stir until well blended.
2. Cover and chill 2-24 hours.
3. Transfer to a serving bowl, sprinkle with pecans or parsley.
4. Serve with crackers.
